title: Millions of planets might form around supermassive black holes
description: Massive amounts of dust swirl around active nuclei at the centres of galaxies, and these discs could give rise to vast numbers of rocky planets, some even the size of stars
author: Jonathan O’Callaghan

title: Wealthy people with environmental ideals are the biggest emitters
description: Among people of high socioeconomic status, love for nature corresponds with a bigger environmental footprint – and there's an obvious reason why
author: Alec Luhn

title: NASA plans a base on the moon spanning hundreds of square kilometres
description: Three missions slated to launch this year will begin to search the lunar surface for a suitable base location
author: Alex Wilkins

title: First quantum grandfather clock could probe where gravity comes from
description: Researchers have designed a quantum version of a pendulum clock. It could shed light on timekeeping in the quantum realm
author: Karmela Padavic-Callaghan

title: We may finally know why gold stays so shiny
description: Gold is chemically inert and so doesn't tarnish, but exactly why had been a mystery
author: Karmela Padavic-Callaghan

title: Weird and wonderful sea pen found on Mystery Ridge
description: An ongoing census of sea life in the South Atlantic has identified over 1000 new creatures, including a new species of sea pen
author: Michael Dalton
